name: Hacker News — extract top story title, score, comments
goal:
Open https://news.ycombinator.com/ and extract data about the #1 story (the very first story listed at the top of the front page).

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY these three keys:
  - "title": the story title (string, exactly as displayed)
  - "score": the score number (integer, NOT a string — e.g. 247 not "247 points")
  - "comments": the comment count (integer, NOT a string — e.g. 89 not "89 comments"; if no comments yet, use 0)

Example correct output:
  {"title": "Show HN: A new browser engine", "score": 247, "comments": 89}

Do NOT include any extra fields. Do NOT wrap the JSON in markdown. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
